title: AI Application Engineer
company_focus: Decentralized AI evaluation and discovery platform
description:
We are on a mission to responsibly accelerate the value of
information and intelligence across society. We are
pioneering a decentralized skills markets, and approach to
scalable AI evaluation and discovery that we believe can do
for AI what PageRank did for the web - usher in more trust,
transparency, and vibrancy.

You’d join a lean, passionate, senior team on the cutting
edge of AI and decentralized technology. We look for high
agency, integrity, and excellent communication as we aim to
empower every person to move the needle on our huge mission.

The Opportunity

As an AI Applications Engineer at Recall Labs, you will
bridge cutting-edge AI research and practical
implementation, translating breakthrough products and
approaches into production-ready products that change how AI
is evaluated and discovered. You'll experiment rapidly, have
massive autonomy and impact, and help shape how AI is
developed and steered for the benefit of humanity. You are
likely deeply embedded in AI product advances, attuned to
the AI research community, and constantly evaluating new
architectures, training techniques, and paradigms.

What You'll Achieve:

- Drive the identification and prioritization of 3-5 high-
  potential experiments based on the newest research
  developments, serving as the key driver of experimental
  flow and ensuring cutting-edge techniques (e.g., novel
  prompting strategies, reasoning approaches, or model
  optimizations) are evaluated and integrated to measurably
  improve product performance
- Build and maintain a comprehensive experimentation
  infrastructure that enables the team to run AI-facilitated
  experiments at scale, combining AI evals with A/B testing
  capabilities to empower rapid experimentation and
  evaluation across the product
- Drive high-impact product releases powered by AI
  innovations, translating cutting-edge research into
  shipped features that demonstrably improve user experience
  and key product metrics
- Accelerate engineering adoption of AI capabilities across
  the organization by working closely with the CTO to
  integrate AI tooling into internal workflows, enabling
  engineers to leverage AI effectively in their day-to-day
  work and ship research-driven features
- Establish a culture of AI expertise and knowledge sharing by
  identifying and disseminating high-potential research,
  helping build team capabilities in AI evals, context
  engineering, and related areas through consistent
  contribution and fast-follow implementation

Skills You'll Need:

You’re likely a great fit if you have:

- Deep familiarity with the current AI landscape, particularly
  in evaluations, reasoning systems, agentic architectures,
  and context engineering techniques
- Demonstrated track record of shipping high impact product
  working with AI, with at least 5 years of engineering
  experience (across any engineering domains).
- Exceptional programming skills, speed, and AI-first
  workflows
- Experience with experiment design, A/B testing, statistical
  analysis, and using data and experiments to drive product
  decisions.
- Working knowledge of model deployment, inference
  optimization, and scaling considerations. Proficiency with
  API integrations across multiple LLM providers (OpenAI,
  Anthropic, Google, open-source models)
- You're obsessed with staying on the leading edge of AI
  research—whether through personal projects, open source
  contributions, implementing the latest papers, or being
  deeply engaged in AI communities—and you can't help but
  experiment with new techniques as they emerge
- Experience working in remote, fast-paced, iterative
  development environments where shipping quickly is valued

If you’re passionate about AI, love building tools that
empower others, and thrive in a fast-moving, experimental
environment, we’d love to hear from you! 🚀

Bonus Points:

- Research curiosity with product pragmatism: You read papers
  for breakfast but also know when "good enough now" beats
  "perfect later"
- Bias toward action: You don't just catalog interesting
  papers—you prototype them
- Strong communication skills: Ability to translate complex
  research concepts into clear recommendations for engineers
  and product teams
- Collaborative experimentation mindset: You involve others in
  your discoveries and help the team learn alongside you
- Comfort with ambiguity: The role evolves as the field
  evolves; you thrive in this uncertainty

At Recall labs, we believe in the power of diversity to
foster innovation and creativity. We encourage candidates
from all backgrounds to apply, especially those who share
our vision of democratizing software customization. If
you're passionate about this role but don't meet every
single requirement, we still want to hear from you. We offer
competitive compensation, equity, and benefits tailored to
provide a comprehensive and fulfilling work-life balance.

Learn more about us at @recallnet & https://recall.network/.

Perks:

- Competitive salary and benefits.
- Contribute to projects at the forefront of the web.
- Work with a company on a mission to have a positive impact.
- Work on a fully remote team.
- Work with/on a small, passionate team.
- An entrepreneurial opportunity where you can have oversized
  impacts.
- Opportunity to drive innovation and strategy.

We value passion, integrity, and an innovative mindset. We
look for rigorous thinkers who ship quickly, collaborate
proactively, learn continuously, and contribute to a fast-
paced and engaging remote workplace. If that resonates, join
us! We strongly encourage applications from individuals who
belong to groups historically underrepresented in tech.

Location

Recall Labs is a fully remote company spanning GMT -8 to GMT
+1 (North America, South America, Central Europe).

Learn more about us at https://recall.network/
responsibilities: Drive the identification and prioritization of high-potential AI experiments based on new research developments
Build and maintain comprehensive experimentation infrastructure for AI-facilitated experiments at scale with A/B testing capabilities
Drive high-impact product releases powered by AI innovations, translating research into shipped features
Accelerate engineering adoption of AI capabilities by integrating AI tooling into internal workflows
Establish a culture of AI expertise and knowledge sharing through research dissemination and fast-follow implementation
use_cases: AI system evaluation and discovery platform using decentralized approaches
Scalable AI evaluation infrastructure combining AI evals with A/B testing
Agentic architectures and reasoning systems for AI-powered product features
Internal AI tooling integration to enhance engineering workflows
Context engineering and prompt optimization for improved model performance
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on work with AI systems including
prompting strategies, reasoning approaches, model
optimization, and agentic architectures. The engineer
directly experiments with and implements cutting-edge AI
techniques, integrates LLM APIs, and deploys models to
production.
